test.create_query: CREATE TABLE bitmap_perf_test ( id UInt32, bm AggregateFunction(groupBitmap, UInt32) ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO bitmap_perf_test SELECT 1 AS id, groupBitmapState(number) AS bm FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO bitmap_perf_test SELECT 2 AS id, groupBitmapState(number + 500000) AS bm FROM numbers(1000000)
INSERT INTO bitmap_perf_test SELECT 3 AS id, groupBitmapState(number * 3) AS bm FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapAnd( (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 2) ))
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapOr( (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 2) ))
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapAnd( bitmapOr( (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 2) ), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 3) ))
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapAnd( bitmapXor( (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 2) ), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 3) ))
SELECT length(bitmapToArray(bitmapOr( (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 1), (SELECT bm FROM bitmap_perf_test WHERE id = 2) )))
